title: Architecture Intake — Test Plan (path → test matrix)
description: Synthesis output of §6 Step 1.7 Architecture Intake: maps runtime targets + critical paths to the REQUIRED test layers, each with an expected artifact + run command, so downstream gates can prove 'tested the right thing for the right target type'. Written to .qa/evidence/<tag>/00-test-plan.yaml. Consumed by qa-required-layer-gate.js (required:true layer with no artifact => BLOCK) and qa-runtime-mismatch-gate.js (runtime_targets[].kind vs produced E2E artifact). DOWNSTREAM TEST AGENTS DO NOT START until this three-piece (runtime + path-graph + test-plan) exists.

required.description: true => qa-required-layer-gate BLOCKs the release if this layer produces no artifact.

reason.description: Which critical path / risk drives this requirement.

expected_artifact.description: e.g. .qa/evidence/<tag>/e2e.json — the file whose presence the required-layer gate checks.

run_command.description: The qa-sdk evidence.run invocation (or raw command) that produces the artifact.

target_kind.description: Which runtime target this layer exercises (mirror of runtimes[].kind) — feeds runtime-mismatch gate.

critical_release_paths.description: The path ids that gate the release — copied verbatim into recompute-context.json so the recompute gate's critical-path-coverage check matches.

runtime_targets.description: Mirror of resolved runtimes (kind + host_capable) for the runtime-mismatch gate: a mobile/api target must NOT be 'covered' only by web Playwright artifacts.

expected_e2e_kind.description: What KIND of E2E artifact legitimately covers this target.
